mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blogger_sentiments (date, ticker, blogger, sentiment_score, horizon, strategy, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{date}, #{ticker}, #{blogger}, #{sentimentScore}, #{horizon}, #{strategy}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sentiment_score = #{sentimentScore}, horizon = #{horizon}, strategy = #{strategy}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, date, ticker, blogger, sentiment_score as sentimentScore, horizon, strategy, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM blogger_sentiments WHERE date = #{date} ORDER BY ticker, blogger
mapper.update: UPDATE blogger_sentiments SET sentiment_score = #{sentimentScore}, horizon = #{horizon}, strategy = #{strategy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
